event: Saint Catherine of Alexandria (Self-Portrait as the Saint)
symbols: palm branch — the victory of martyrdom, the saint's triumph over death through faith
youthful beauty — Catherine's legendary beauty and intellectual brilliance
description: A half-length portrait of a young woman with a gentle, direct gaze, shown against a dark background. She has light brown hair pulled back with a braid and veil, and wears a golden-yellow dress with gathered sleeves over a white undergarment, with a pink or rose-colored mantle draped over one shoulder. In her right hand she holds a palm branch, the attribute of martyrdom. Her expression is calm and composed, with a slight, knowing smile. The painting technique is soft and luminous, with delicate modeling of the skin and careful rendering of the fabric textures.
